name: Asian Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by combining 1 cup of canola oil, 3/4 cup of rice wine vinegar, and 3/4 cup of sugar in a covered jar.
2. Add the flavoring package from the chicken-flavored Ramen noodles to the mixture.
3. Shake vigorously until well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the chopped cabbage, carrot, onions, almonds, sesame seeds, and crushed Ramen noodles.
5. Combine the dressing with the vegetable mixture and mix well.
